title: Trade With Player Behavior
description: Allows the player to trade with this mob. When the goal starts, it will stop the mob's navigation.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

max_distance_from_player.title: Max Distance From Player
max_distance_from_player.description: The max distance that the mob can be from the player before exiting the goal.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
